texto: I like entertainment and think mastery is good, though I don't feel like a master. If a theme means having a story that's legible, then that's certainly what we do. But we don't treat design as an add-on layer.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a David Rockwell: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I like entertainment and think mastery is good, though I don't feel like a master. If a theme mea…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, good, treat pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de treat e think.

frase_original: I like entertainment and think mastery is good, though I don't feel like a master. If a theme means having a story that's legible, then that's certainly what we do. But we don't treat design as an add-on layer.
